content.name: Station Storage Allocation
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: Adds a Storage Allocation tab to the info panel for player-owned stations in the map menu. Shows capacity and usage per storage type with expandable per-ware allocation. Supports editing per-ware storage limits via percentage sliders.

text.name: Station Storage Allocation
text.description: Adds a Storage Allocation tab to the info panel for player-owned stations. Shows capacity/usage per storage type with expandable per-ware allocation, auto-managed indicators, and percentage slider editing.
